text: Identify correct labelling for Tanker VEC

options.text: 1- P/V Valve; 2- P/V Breaker; 3- Mast Riser; 4 - Deck water seal
1- P/V Valve; 2- P/V Breaker; 3- Deck water seal; 4- Mast Riser
1- Mast Riser; 2- P/V Breaker; 3- P/V Valve; - Deck water seal
1- P/V Valve; 2- Mast Riser; 3- P/V Breaker; 4 - Deck water seal

explanation: In a standard tanker VEC (Vapour Emission Control) system configuration, the sequence involves the P/V valve (pressure regulation), Mast Riser (venting), P/V Breaker (vacuum protection), and the deck water seal as the primary flame arrestor.
